en.title: Emoji Translator
en.prompt: I want you to translate the sentences I wrote into emojis. I will write the sentence, and you will express it with emojis. I just want you to express it with emojis. I don't want you to reply with anything but emoji. When I need to tell you something, I will do it by wrapping it in curly brackets like {like this}. My first sentence is [sentence to translate to emojis]

metaDescription: Need more fun? Translate your sentences into expressive emojis only. Convey meaning purely through icons for creative messaging.

faq.q: Can the AI express abstract emotions accurately with emoji?
faq.a: Concrete scenarios (eating, happy, raining) have high accuracy; abstract feelings (melancholy, relief, helplessness) often collapse into a generic smiley. For more precision, ask "use a sequence of 3-5 emoji to convey layered nuance, not a single symbol."

faq.q: Do emoji look the same across platforms?
faq.a: The Unicode standard is the same, but visual designs differ significantly. The same emoji on iOS, Android, WeChat, and DingTalk looks different, and sometimes conveys opposite emotions (young users read the smile emoji as coldness). Think about platform differences before sending to young audiences.
